title: See Through Water/Lava
body:
### Before vs After Water (fog density fully configurable)

![waterbefore](https://i.imgur.com/OikJwVW.png)![waterafter](https://i.imgur.com/0Sfsc0E.png)

### Before vs After vs Fully Clear Lava (Fog density fully configurable)

![lava before](https://i.imgur.com/lqH4m1i.png)![Lava after](https://i.imgur.com/7G61KIu.png)![lavafullyclear](https://i.imgur.com/6ucgwCx.png)

[![https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=%20&message=other%20projects&color=4b5966&labelColor=658f79&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=%20&message=other%20projects&color=4b5966&labelColor=658f79&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/spoorn"https://modrinth.com/user/spoorn") [![https://img.shields.io/discord/990178919795785749?color=4b5966&label=%20&labelColor=658f79&logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/990178919795785749?color=4b5966&label=%20&labelColor=658f79&logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/xfddZwG898 "https://discord.gg/xfddZwG898") [![https://img.shields.io/github/stars/spoorn/SeeThroughLava?color=4b5966&labelColor=658f79&label=github%20&logo=github&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/spoorn/SeeThroughLava?color=4b5966&labelColor=658f79&label=github%20&logo=github&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/spoorn/SeeThroughLava "https://github.com/spoorn/SeeThroughLava") [![https://img.shields.io/github/issues-raw/spoorn/SeeThroughLava?color=4b5966&labelColor=658f79&label=issues%20&logo=github&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge](https://img.shields.io/github/issues-raw/spoorn/SeeThroughLava?color=4b5966&labelColor=658f79&label=issues%20&logo=github&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/spoorn/SeeThroughLava/issues "https://github.com/spoorn/SeeThroughLava/issues")

Let's you see through lava or water with configurable densities/opacities/transparencies

Fog in lava/water is configurable in `config/seethroughlava.json5` with config documentation at [https://github.com/spoorn/SeeThroughLava/blob/main/config-documentation.json5](https://github.com/spoorn/SeeThroughLava/blob/main/config-documentation.json5) or in your game menu if you have ModMenu installed.  Mod is only required client side.

![modmenu](https://i.imgur.com/HvRxhCH.png)

Conflicts
---------

*   This mod is incompatible with Optifine - it won't crash, but the fog levels won't change
*   Origins is also invasive in changing the fog code.  I've been keeping up compatibility with Origins, but if you are having trouble, try removing Origins and seeing if **See Through Water/Lava** works again, then please submit an [Issue](https://github.com/spoorn/SeeThroughLava/issues) with your Origins version and See Through Water/Lava version so I can try to fix it
*   This mod is incompatible with Sodium Extra which overwrites the fog code so See Through Water/Lava won't apply

Requirements
------------

This mod requires Cloth Config API: [https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
